message:
feat: Add native _markupsafe_speedups C extension for Jinja2

Compile MarkupSafe's _speedups.c (200 lines) as a built-in module for
fast HTML escaping. Adapted for CPython 3.13 (removed PyUnicode_READY).
Bridge module in site-packages maps markupsafe._speedups to the builtin.

All jinja2/markupsafe tests pass (packages + cf-compat).
